name: MiniRte

unions.name: Msg
unions.comment:
For toolbar icons or shortcut keys. See the [example](https://github.com/dkodaj/rte/tree/master/example) for tips.

      Active Bool       -- turn editing on/off
    | AddText String    -- insert text
    | Bold              -- make text bold
    | Class String      -- put a class on current paragraph 
    | Core MiniRte.Core.Msg
                        -- normally, you won't need this
    | Cut
    | Copy
    | Font (List String)
                        -- set current font families
                        -- e.g. ["Oswald", "sans-serif"]
    | FontSize Float    -- set current font size
    | FromBrowserClipboard String
                        -- see package description
    | Heading           -- toggles between h1 and plain div
    | ImageAdd String   -- embed image (the String is a link)
    | ImageInput String -- modify content of image input box
    | Indent            -- increase indent of current para
    | Italic            -- make text italic
    | LinkAdd String    -- add link to current selection
    | LinkInput String  -- modify content of link input box
    | NoOp              -- normally, you won't need this
    | StrikeThrough     -- cross out text
    | TextAlign MiniRte.Types.TextAlign
                        -- change alignment of current para
    | ToBrowserClipboard String
                        -- see package description
    | ToggleEmojiBox    -- turn emoji input box on/off
    | ToggleImageBox    -- turn image link input box on/off
    | ToggleLinkBox     -- turn link input box on/off
    | Underline         -- underline text
    | Undo              -- undo last action
    | Unindent          -- decrease indent of current para
    | Unlink            -- remove the link the cursor is touching

aliases.name: DisplayParams
aliases.comment:
`content` can be plain text or a json string created with [encodedContent](#encodedContent).

`fontSizeUnit` defaults to `"px"`.
    
`indentUnit` defaults to `(50,"px")`.
aliases.type: { content : String.String, fontSizeUnit : Maybe.Maybe String.String, highlighter : Maybe.Maybe (MiniRte.Types.Content -> MiniRte.Types.Content), indentUnit : Maybe.Maybe ( Basics.Float, String.String ), styling : List.List a }

aliases.name: EmojiBoxParams
aliases.type: { styling : { active : List.List a, inactive : List.List a }, emojis : List.List String.String }

aliases.name: FontSelectorParams
aliases.type: { styling : List.List a, fonts : List.List (List.List String.String) }

aliases.name: FontSizeSelectorParams
aliases.type: { styling : List.List a, sizes : List.List Basics.Float }

aliases.name: InputBoxParams
aliases.type: { styling : { active : List.List a, inactive : List.List a } }

aliases.name: Parameters
aliases.comment:
`id` must be unique; it is used to monitor the position of characters.

`content` is the initial content of the textarea. It can be `Just` some plain text or a json string generated by [encodedContent](#encodedContent).

`fontSizeUnit` defaults to `"px"`.

`highlighter` runs before each view update and it re-styles the text. See the [example](https://github.com/dkodaj/rte/tree/master/example).

`indentUnit` defaults to `(50,"px")`.

`selectionStyle` controls the appearance of selected text. It defaults to `[("background", "hsl(217,71%,53%)"), ("color", "white")]`.

`styling.active` styles the textarea in active mode (when editing). Use `update (Active True/False)` to switch between modes.

`tagger` turns the package's own [Msg](#Msg) type into your app's msg.
aliases.type: { id : String.String, content : Maybe.Maybe String.String, fontSizeUnit : Maybe.Maybe String.String, highlighter : Maybe.Maybe (MiniRte.Types.Content -> MiniRte.Types.Content), indentUnit : Maybe.Maybe ( Basics.Float, String.String ), selectionStyle : List.List ( String.String, String.String ), styling : { active : List.List a, inactive : List.List a }, tagger : MiniRte.Msg -> msg }

aliases.name: Rte
aliases.type: { emojiBox : Basics.Bool, inputBox : Maybe.Maybe MiniRte.InputBox, styling : { active : List.List (Html.Attribute msg), inactive : List.List (Html.Attribute msg) }, tagger : MiniRte.Msg -> msg, textarea : MiniRte.Core.Editor }

aliases.name: RteStyled
aliases.type: { emojiBox : Basics.Bool, inputBox : Maybe.Maybe MiniRte.InputBox, styling : { active : List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute msg), inactive : List.List (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) }, tagger : MiniRte.Msg -> msg, textarea : MiniRte.Core.Editor }

aliases.name: SwitchParams
aliases.type: { activeColor : String.String, inactiveColor : String.String, width : Basics.Float }

values.name: display
values.comment:
Display formatted text, without an editor.

If you want to preserve the option of editing it, create an editor with [init](#init) and put it in passive mode with `update (Active False)`.
values.type: (MiniRte.Msg -> msg) -> MiniRte.DisplayParams (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: displayStyled
values.type: (MiniRte.Msg -> msg) -> MiniRte.DisplayParams (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: emojiBox
values.comment:
Make it appear/disappear with `update ToggleEmojiBox`.
Each `x` in `params.emojis` turns into a clickable div that triggers `update AddText`.
values.type: MiniRte.Rte msg -> MiniRte.EmojiBoxParams (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: emojiBoxStyled
values.type: MiniRte.RteStyled msg -> MiniRte.EmojiBoxParams (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: encodedContent
values.comment:
Serialize the content of the textarea, including formatting, links, and images.
You can write the result into a database and use it later with [init](#init) or [display](#display).
Suitable for both `Rte` and `RteStyled`.
values.type: { a | textarea : MiniRte.Core.Editor } -> String.String

values.name: fontSelector
values.type: MiniRte.Rte msg -> MiniRte.FontSelectorParams (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: fontSelectorStyled
values.type: MiniRte.RteStyled msg -> MiniRte.FontSelectorParams (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: fontSizeSelector
values.type: MiniRte.Rte msg -> MiniRte.FontSizeSelectorParams (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: fontSizeSelectorStyled
values.type: MiniRte.RteStyled msg -> MiniRte.FontSizeSelectorParams (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: init
values.type: MiniRte.Parameters (Html.Attribute msg) msg -> ( MiniRte.Rte msg, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: initStyled
values.comment: Same as `init` but you pass in lists of [Html.Styled.Attributes](https://package.elm-lang.org/packages/rtfeldman/elm-css/latest/Html-Styled-Attributes) in [`Parameters`](#Parameters).
values.type: MiniRte.Parameters (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) msg -> ( MiniRte.RteStyled msg, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: inputBox
values.comment:
Input box for adding hyperlinks and image links.
Make it appear/disappear with `update ToggleImageBox` or `update ToggleLinkBox`.
It contains an OK button that triggers `update ImageAdd` or `update LinkAdd`.
values.type: MiniRte.Rte msg -> MiniRte.InputBoxParams (Html.Attribute msg) -> Html.Html msg

values.name: inputBoxStyled
values.type: MiniRte.RteStyled msg -> MiniRte.InputBoxParams (Html.Styled.Attribute msg) -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: isActive
values.comment: Checks if the editor is active. Suitable for both `Rte` and `RteStyled`.
values.type: { a | textarea : MiniRte.Core.Editor } -> Basics.Bool

values.name: onOffSwitch
values.type: MiniRte.Rte msg -> MiniRte.SwitchParams -> Html.Html msg

values.name: onOffSwitchStyled
values.type: MiniRte.RteStyled msg -> MiniRte.SwitchParams -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: subscriptions
values.type: MiniRte.Rte msg -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg

values.name: subscriptionsStyled
values.type: MiniRte.RteStyled msg -> Platform.Sub.Sub msg

values.name: textContent
values.comment: The plain text content of the textarea. Suitable for both `Rte` and `RteStyled`.
values.type: { a | textarea : MiniRte.Core.Editor } -> String.String

values.name: textarea
values.comment: Displays the edited text plus the cursor. This object *must not* be the child of a `position: relative` node. It screws up cursor placement.
values.type: MiniRte.Rte msg -> Html.Html msg

values.name: textareaStyled
values.type: MiniRte.RteStyled msg -> Html.Styled.Html msg

values.name: update
values.type: MiniRte.Msg -> MiniRte.Rte msg -> ( MiniRte.Rte msg, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

values.name: updateStyled
values.type: MiniRte.Msg -> MiniRte.RteStyled msg -> ( MiniRte.RteStyled msg, Platform.Cmd.Cmd msg )

name: MiniRte.Types
comment:
When writing a highlighter, modify the `highlightClasses` or `highlightStyling` fields of the elements.

Each string `x` in `highlightClasses` turns into `Html.Attribute.class x`.

Each `(x,y)` in `highlightStyling` turns into `Html.Attribute.style x y`.

Attributes of `LineBreak`s apply to the preceding paragraph as a whole.

@docs Content, Element, Character, EmbeddedHtml, LineBreak,
Child, FontStyle, StyleTags, TextAlign

aliases.name: Character
aliases.type: { char : Char.Char, fontStyle : MiniRte.Types.FontStyle, highlightClasses : List.List String.String, highlightStyling : MiniRte.Types.StyleTags, id : Basics.Int, link : Maybe.Maybe String.String }
